target: 16. Because Ajiro-kun Was There
If you have that right eye... It certainly might be possible.
To go back in time and redo things...
July 24
Shinpei Ajiro
(Two days have passed since then. I tried my best to see if I could somehow stop people from coming to the island, but...)
(Far from getting any results, the number of visitors ended up increasing even more than last time.)
(And so, unable to do anything... I welcomed the day of the summer festival.)
We come here all the time, so you didn't have to walk me here.
There are more tourists for the festival than usual. You can never be too careful.
More importantly... I'm sorry. For telling you not to go to the festival.
No, it's fine.
Since Onee-chan isn't here, I wasn't thinking of going to the festival by myself anyway.
Besides, Tokiko also said, "Then let's hang out at home together."
Well, Sou-kun didn't seem too convinced about it, though.
I'll talk to you properly tomorrow. To Sou, Mio, and Toki-chan too.

It's a promise.
See you later.
Yeah, give my regards to Toki-chan and Sou.
(Not letting the people close to me go to the festival... That's all I can do, but...)
(Compared to throwing Mio and Sou and the others into the middle of that tragedy, this is much better.)
(But it's not over yet. Since I couldn't cancel today's event, the only way left to avoid casualties is...)
(To defeat the boss of the Shadows!)
(There's still a little time before the fireworks go off. No commotion has started yet.)
Phew…
(Even though I've prepared myself for this... The only thing I can call a weapon is a single kitchen knife, huh.)
(Against a Shadow with such inhuman physical abilities, it's not very reassuring.)
(But... even if I'm going to die anyway, I want to at least get one hit in.)
(And... in the next loop, for sure!)
Gyaaaaaahhh!!
Uwaaaah...!?!? R-Run awayyy!!!

A scream…?
Has the massacre already started!?
Why!? The fireworks and the live haven't even started yet!
(Anyway, I just have to go!!)
Uwaaaaaahhh!!
(The Four-Armed Shadow attacking the audience... The bodies piling up...)
(What's different is...)
...Damn, I missed!

target: Ah...
Ajiro-kun!!
Koyuba-san!?

You're safe!
Thank goodness…
No, that's...!
Guh, aah!!
(Wh-What!? An intense pain in my leg!!)
This is my first time stabbing someone, but it's actually pretty easy.
(You've gotta be kidding me...! Koyuba-san... stabbed me!?)
Ufufu...
You... were a Shadow!?
Hey, Ajiro-kun?
You know, I really did try to follow what Ajiro-kun told me.
I wanted to cancel the live stream, and cancel the live performance too.
Even though my idol work and the town revitalization were really important...
But if I did that, the important food wouldn't gather, and Mother would be troubled, wouldn't she?
So... hehe, I got rid of the real Kaori.
(It's my fault... My actions changed Koyuba-san's fate...)
(My words had reached Koyuba-san. She was acting so she wouldn't have to stream...)
(But doing that would interfere with the Shadows' goal of gathering as many people as possible.)
(That's why the Shadows turned Koyuba-san into a Shadow...)
Damn it!! It's all my fault!!
You're so pitiful, Shin-chan.
(Mio's Shadow...)
Even though you worked so hard for three days.
Eh...
We've all been watching you work so hard this whole time, Ajiro-kun.
Eh, this whole time...!?
You contacted me so many times, didn't you? I was so happy seeing Ajiro-kun's name filling up my call history.
Hehe, even though it was all meaningless.
Why... are you so fixated on him? He's just... an islander...
(That person is still alive…)
That's because I found out that Ajiro-kun has something that might be a threat to Mother.
Something that could be a threat...?
But Mother doesn't seem interested in Shin-chan anymore.
Yeah, in the end, if we keep Ajiro-kun alive instead of killing him, he won't be able to loop time anymore, right?
Exactly. You're not a threat or anything anymore.
(They know about the loop!?)
So with that said! Ajiro-kun, just stay quiet right there!
With this wound and bleeding, I don't think you'll die right away, but if you push yourself, who knows?
So don't go moving around like an idiot.
(My movements are sealed...)
(They're going to keep me alive no matter what... to seal off the loop...)
Damn it, at this rate...!
I see... so you're the one...
If only I had... found you sooner...
P-Please! Kill me with that gun!
Even if I die, I can start over! Please shoot me, hurry!
So that's what... the "loop" meant...
If you... are able to start over again...
Give me... your name... I will definitely... help...
Ah...
That's too bad, Ajiro-kun. It seems she didn't even have the strength left to pull the trigger anymore.
Looks like you have no choice but to give up.
(It's no use...)
(This time, it really is over...)
(This sight again...)
(A mountain of countless corpses.)
(A giant shadow swallowing the island.)
(Everything precious to me, being swallowed up.)
With this, Mother can regain her power. It's all thanks to everyone.
Don't say that... with Koyuba-san's face...
She loved this island!
I know. Because I am Koyuba Kaori.
You're wrong! There's no way she would have wanted this outcome!
Is that so? It's not like the island I loved is going to disappear.
The reason I've treasured the island and my memories here more than anything else is...
Because Ajiro-kun was here, you know.
Eh…?
It's almost our turn. Look, it's almost here.
Ah...
(The giant shadow has reached our feet...)
